mapper.insert: insert into course_reschedule ( leave_request_id, course_schedule_id, teacher_id, original_week_day, original_start_section, original_end_section, original_week_range, original_classroom_id, new_week_day, new_start_section, new_end_section, new_week_range, new_classroom_id, reason, status ) select #{leaveRequestId}, #{dto.courseScheduleId}, #{teacherId}, cs.week_day, cs.start_section, cs.end_section, cs.week_range, cs.classroom_id, #{dto.newWeekDay}, #{dto.newStartSection}, #{dto.newEndSection}, coalesce(#{dto.newWeekRange}, cs.week_range), #{dto.newClassroomId}, #{dto.reason}, '待确认' from course_schedule cs where cs.id = #{dto.courseScheduleId}
mapper.update: update course_reschedule set status = '已确认', update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = '待确认'
update course_reschedule set status = '已取消', update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = '待确认'
mapper.select: select cr.id, cr.leave_request_id, cr.course_schedule_id, cr.teacher_id, co.course_name as course_name, (select group_concat(c2.class_name separator ',') from course_schedule_class csc2 join class c2 on csc2.class_id = c2.id where csc2.schedule_id = cs.id) as class_name, t.name as teacher_name, cr.original_week_day, cr.original_start_section, cr.original_end_section, cr.original_classroom_id, ocr.room_number as original_classroom_name, cr.new_week_day, cr.new_start_section, cr.new_end_section, cr.new_classroom_id, ncr.room_number as new_classroom_name, cr.status, cr.reason, cr.original_week_range, cr.new_week_range, cr.approver_id, cr.approve_time, cr.create_time, cr.update_time from course_reschedule cr left join course_schedule cs on cr.course_schedule_id = cs.id left join course co on cs.course_id = co.id left join teacher t on cr.teacher_id = t.id left join classroom ocr on cr.original_classroom_id = ocr.id left join classroom ncr on cr.new_classroom_id = ncr.id where cr.leave_request_id = #{leaveRequestId} order by cr.id

select cr.id, cr.leave_request_id, cr.course_schedule_id, cr.teacher_id, co.course_name as course_name, (select group_concat(c2.class_name separator ',') from course_schedule_class csc2 join class c2 on csc2.class_id = c2.id where csc2.schedule_id = cs.id) as class_name, t.name as teacher_name, cr.original_week_day, cr.original_start_section, cr.original_end_section, cr.original_classroom_id, ocr.room_number as original_classroom_name, cr.new_week_day, cr.new_start_section, cr.new_end_section, cr.new_classroom_id, ncr.room_number as new_classroom_name, cr.status, cr.reason, cr.original_week_range, cr.new_week_range, cr.approver_id, cr.approve_time, cr.create_time, cr.update_time from course_reschedule cr left join course_schedule cs on cr.course_schedule_id = cs.id left join course co on cs.course_id = co.id left join teacher t on cr.teacher_id = t.id left join classroom ocr on cr.original_classroom_id = ocr.id left join classroom ncr on cr.new_classroom_id = ncr.id where cr.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by cr.id desc

select cr.id, cr.leave_request_id, cr.course_schedule_id, cr.teacher_id, co.course_name as course_name, (select group_concat(c2.class_name separator ',') from course_schedule_class csc2 join class c2 on csc2.class_id = c2.id where csc2.schedule_id = cs.id) as class_name, t.name as teacher_name, cr.original_week_day, cr.original_start_section, cr.original_end_section, cr.original_classroom_id, ocr.room_number as original_classroom_name, cr.new_week_day, cr.new_start_section, cr.new_end_section, cr.new_classroom_id, ncr.room_number as new_classroom_name, cr.status, cr.reason, cr.original_week_range, cr.new_week_range, cr.approver_id, cr.approve_time, cr.create_time, cr.update_time from course_reschedule cr left join course_schedule cs on cr.course_schedule_id = cs.id left join course co on cs.course_id = co.id left join teacher t on cr.teacher_id = t.id left join classroom ocr on cr.original_classroom_id = ocr.id left join classroom ncr on cr.new_classroom_id = ncr.id where cr.id = #{id}

select cs.id as course_schedule_id, co.course_name as course_name, (select group_concat(c2.class_name separator ',') from course_schedule_class csc2 join class c2 on csc2.class_id = c2.id where csc2.schedule_id = cs.id) as class_name, cs.week_day as original_week_day, cs.start_section as original_start_section, cs.end_section as original_end_section, cr.room_number as original_classroom_name from course_schedule cs left join course co on cs.course_id = co.id left join classroom cr on cs.classroom_id = cr.id where cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by cs.week_day, cs.start_section

select cr.id, cr.leave_request_id, cr.course_schedule_id, cr.teacher_id, co.course_name as course_name, (select group_concat(c2.class_name separator ',') from course_schedule_class csc2 join class c2 on csc2.class_id = c2.id where csc2.schedule_id = cs.id) as class_name, t.name as teacher_name, cr.original_week_day, cr.original_start_section, cr.original_end_section, cr.original_classroom_id, ocr.room_number as original_classroom_name, cr.new_week_day, cr.new_start_section, cr.new_end_section, cr.new_classroom_id, ncr.room_number as new_classroom_name, cr.status, cr.reason, cr.original_week_range, cr.new_week_range, cr.approver_id, cr.approve_time, cr.create_time, cr.update_time from course_reschedule cr left join course_schedule cs on cr.course_schedule_id = cs.id left join course co on cs.course_id = co.id left join teacher t on cr.teacher_id = t.id left join classroom ocr on cr.original_classroom_id = ocr.id left join classroom ncr on cr.new_classroom_id = ncr.id where cr.status = '待确认' order by cr.id desc
mapper.update: update course_reschedule set status = '已确认', approver_id = #{adminId}, approve_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = '待确认'
update course_reschedule set status = '已取消', reason = concat_ws(' ', reason, #{reason}), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = '待确认'
